title: Principal nilpotent orbits and reducible principal series
journal: Representation Theory of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:
Let 

  
    G
    G
  

 be a split reductive 

  
    p
    p
  

-adic group. In this paper, we establish an explicit link between principal nilpotent orbits of 

  
    G
    G
  

 and the irreducible constituents of principal series of 

  
    G
    G
  

. A geometric characterization of certain irreducible constituents is also provided.
